title: Obedience
question: Did I disobey my mom, dad, or the adults taking care of me?
description: God asks us to honor and obey our parents because they take care of us (CCC 2217).
counsels: Try to listen the first time next time.
Remember they want what is best for you.

title: Truth
question: Did I tell a lie instead of telling the truth?
description: God loves truth, and lying hurts trust (CCC 2483).
counsels: Tell the truth, even if it is hard.
Fix what happened because of the lie.
prevention: Take a deep breath before answering
Practice being honest in small things

title: Kindness
question: Was I mean to someone — did I hit, push, call names, or say hurtful things?
description: Jesus wants us to be kind and gentle with everyone (CCC 2302).
counsels: Try to make them feel better.

title: Kindness
question: Did I leave someone out on purpose or refuse to play with them to be mean?
description: Jesus teaches us to include and love others (John 13:34).
counsels: Be a friend to someone who feels alone.
prevention: Look for someone who needs a friend

title: Justice
question: Did I take something that was not mine without asking?
description: We must respect what belongs to others (CCC 2408).

title: Family Love
question: Was I mean to my brothers or sisters or did I start a fight?
description: We must love our family and treat them with kindness (CCC 2303).

title: Love of God
question: Did I behave badly at Mass or not pay attention on purpose?
description: Mass is a special time to be with God and we should be respectful (CCC 2181).

title: Prayer
question: Did I forget to pray or not try to talk to God?
description: God wants to hear from us every day (CCC 2744).
counsels: Talk to God like a friend.
prevention: Pray in the morning and at night

title: Reverence for God
question: Did I use God's name or Jesus' name as a bad word?
description: God's name is holy and should be spoken with love (CCC 2162).
prevention: Replace bad words with kind words

title: Forgiveness
question: Did I stay angry or refuse to forgive someone?
description: Jesus teaches us to forgive others (CCC 2840).
prevention: Talk to a parent about feelings
